parts.text: Achilles, describe the formation of hoplites at Marathon.
The Athenians deployed in a phalanx formation — shields interlocked, doru spears levelled. The wings were reinforced while the center was thinned to encircle the Persian flanks.

response.output: Athenian phalanx: 10,000 hoplites, double-envelopment maneuver confirmed.

parts.text: The double-envelopment crushed the Persian infantry. Delphi records this as one of the greatest tactical victories of the ancient world.
